purpose: Track minimized agent-surface repros without preserving report source context.

fixtures.followUp: Define and enforce or expose an agent-deterministic binding rule for generic type parameters that reuse visible concrete type names.
Keep lexical borrow semantics unless deliberately changed, but expose active borrow root, path, binding, and repair facts in JSON diagnostics.
Parse use declarations into first-class import nodes and tie resolver diagnostics to their source ranges.
Parse use declarations as syntax-bearing nodes so malformed import paths produce parser diagnostics instead of being skipped.
Report target-aware backend blockers before emission and keep backend diagnostics target-correct.
